description: Clean the estate sale dataset to calculate the total revenue from sold items, resolving inconsistent status entries and extracting prices from mixed-format cells. Determine if the $2,000 moving truck goal was met.

natural_language.prompt: Open the estate sale inventory spreadsheet. Clean up the messy data to calculate total revenue from sold items. Create formulas to handle inconsistent 'Status' entries (SOLD, sold, etc.) and extract actual sale prices from the 'Notes' column. Calculate if the $2,000 goal was met.
